originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Implementing CUDA Kernel for GAE with CPU Fallback and Cleaning Up PufferLib
summary: Worked on implementing a CUDA kernel for generalized advantage estimation (GAE) with a graceful CPU fallback in PufferLib, reducing code size from 1500 to 1075 lines. Also ported E3B and diversity all you need algorithms to the new codebase and began exploring off-policy learning limitations related to value function staleness.
